solid.name: Solid
solid.description: Solids are one of the three main substances in Oxygen Not Included. They exist naturally as tiles, and can be dug into raw materials. Solids serve a wide variety of purposes, from basic building to advanced machinery. Digging a solid tile will destroy half of its mass, while the other half is transformed into movable material. Solids melts 3°C above their specified melting point. The same, liquids solidify 3 °C under their specified freezing point.

abyssalite.name: Abyssalite
abyssalite.description: Abyssalite is a very strong solid element in the Miscellaneous category and is found in large veins separating Biomes. It acts as a natural thermal insulator, preventing heat exchange between biomes as long as the Abyssalite boundary remains intact. In order to mine Abyssalite, a Duplicant must possess the Superhard Digging skill. Abyssalite cannot directly be used as a construction material, but can be combined with and the Rare Resource inside a Molecular Forge to create , which is an extremely similar material that can be used in construction.

algae.name: Algae
algae.description: Algae is one of the organic resources in the game. It is an important source in early game.

aluminum_ore.name: Aluminum Ore
aluminum_ore.description: Aluminum Ore is a Metal Ore found in abundance in the Forest Biome. It has the highest heat capacity and conductivity among naturally occurring metal ores.

amber.name: Amber
amber.description: Amber is organic matter produced by Lura Plants and can be melted into Resin then transformed into Plastic.

basalt.name: Basalt
basalt.description: is a Raw Mineral found in the Abyss Biome. It can be used as a construction material. A Duplicant must learn Super-Duperhard Digging to dig Basalt.

bitumen.name: Bitumen
bitumen.description: Bitumen is unused in current game despite its description.

bleach_stone.name: Bleach Stone
bleach_stone.description: Bleach Stone is a Consumable Ore that emits Chlorine in its mined state.

brackwax.name: Brackwax
brackwax.description: Brackwax is an end-game intermediate product directly obtained from Brackene required to manufacture Plastium and that can also be used to accelerate travel speed inside Transit Tubes.

ceramic.name: Ceramic
ceramic.description: Ceramic is an advanced building material available in mid-game.

cinnabar_ore.name: Cinnabar Ore
cinnabar_ore.description: Cinnabar Ore is a Metal Ore found in the Ice Cave Biome. It is exclusive to the Frosty Planet DLC. It can be used to construct buildings that require Metal Ore, or it can be refined into Mercury.

clay.name: Clay
clay.description: Clay is one of the Resources in the game Oxygen Not Included.

coal.name: Coal
coal.description: Coal is a Consumable Ore found in the Temperate and Caustic Biomes. It can be used to create power using a Coal Generator. Most Hatch types produce Coal after consuming enough resources. The only one that does not is the Smooth Hatch.

cobalt.name: Cobalt
cobalt.description: Cobalt is a Refined Metal produced by processing with a Rock Crusher, Metal Refinery, or Smooth Hatches. Cobalt is also produced in its by Cobalt Volcanoes.

cobalt_ore.name: Cobalt Ore
cobalt_ore.description: Cobalt Ore is a Metal Ore found in abundance in the Swampy Biome. It is used as a construction material and can be refined into pure .

copper.name: Copper
copper.description: Copper is a Refined Metal and can be refined from Copper Ore.

copper_ore.name: Copper Ore
copper_ore.description: Copper Ore is the Metal Ore of the Sandstone Biome. It is the only Metal Ore there, and can be considered the Metal Ore equivelent of .

coquina.name: Coquina
coquina.description: is a building material and can be found in the Reef Biome.

corallium.name: Corallium
corallium.description: is an organic material found in the Reef Biome, the starting biome of the Marinea Asteroid or equivalent planetoid in Planetoid Clusters.

corium.name: Corium
corium.description: Corium is a radioactive mixture of reactor material and , which it will emit as an Element. It vaporizes into at

crushed_ice.name: Crushed Ice
crushed_ice.description: Crushed Ice is a Water source. It is unstable and will fall down if not sitting on another tile or material.

crushed_rock.name: Crushed Rock
crushed_rock.description: Crushed Rock can be brought from Arid Planet space destination as a filler. It has not much use except for being fed to Hatches (or melted into in a similar way as ).

depleted_uranium.name: Depleted Uranium
depleted_uranium.description: Depleted Uranium is a Solid, a byproduct of enriching Uranium in an Uranium Centrifuge.

diamond.name: Diamond
diamond.description: Diamond is a generic building material that is only obtainable in the Oil Biome or the Abyss Biome, where it is present in a moderately limited quantity.

dirt.name: Dirt
dirt.description: Dirt is an important type of agricultural resource. It's especially important in the early game for the Research Station and initial food sources via Mush Bars and Mealwood. In the late game, it is necessary to grow domestic Sleet Wheat and to manufacture Fertilizer. Dirt has a overheat modifier.

electrum.name: Electrum
electrum.description: Electrum is a Metal Ore no longer available in current game.

enriched_uranium.name: Enriched Uranium
enriched_uranium.description: Enriched Uranium is a Manufactured Material, produced by a Uranium Centrifuge or Beeta Hive from Uranium Ore.

fertilizer.name: Fertilizer
fertilizer.description: Fertilizer is an Agriculture Resource. It is found in the Temperate Biome, in tiles of 50 kg around .

fossil.name: Fossil
fossil.description: Fossil is a Mineral that can be found at the bottom of the map in the Oil Biome in moderate quantities and in small amounts in the Ocean Biome. It can be used as a general construction material.

frozen_brackene.name: Frozen Brackene
frozen_brackene.description: Frozen Brackene is the solid state of Brackene.

frozen_mucin.name: Frozen Mucin
frozen_mucin.description: is the Solid state of . It is frozen from Mucin by cooling it down to (freezing point - 3 °C).

frozen_ovolene.name: Frozen Ovolene
frozen_ovolene.description: is the Solid state of . It is frozen from Ovolene by cooling it down to (freezing point - 3 °C).

frozen_squid_ink.name: Frozen Squid Ink
frozen_squid_ink.description: is the Solid state of . It is frozen from Squid Ink by cooling it down to (freezing point - 3 °C).

genetic_ooze.name: Genetic Ooze
genetic_ooze.description: Genetic Ooze is the material that Duplicants, Plants, Seeds, Critters, Eggs, Data Bank, Artifacts and Food are made from. It is not intended to be obtained in its raw form, although is typically a symptom of in-game bugs; it is useful primarily for knowing how these items exchange heat with their environment.

glass.name: Glass
glass.description: Glass is a Manufactured Material. It is the solidified phase of Molten Glass, which is made in a Glass Forge, and forms once its temperature drops below the melting point.

gold.name: Gold
gold.description: Gold is a Refined Metal. It can be obtained by Refinement of Gold Amalgam.

gold_amalgam.name: Gold Amalgam
gold_amalgam.description: Gold Amalgam is a Metal Ore found in the Marsh Biome in small to modest abundance. It is used as a specialist construction material and can be refined into pure Gold.

granite.name: Granite
granite.description: Granite is a Raw Mineral found in the "Granite ring" that surrounds the starting Temperate Biome or the Forest Biome. It is also found in the Frozen Biome, Oil Biome, and the Barren Biome. It can be used as a general construction material. A Duplicant must learn the Hard Digging Skill to dig Granite.

graphite.name: Graphite
graphite.description: New element exclusive to Spaced Out DLC. It is used to craft in the Molecular Forge. It is found exclusively on the Water Asteroid in the bottom half of the planetoid.

gum_wood.name: Gum Wood
gum_wood.description: is a type of lumber and an intermediary product in the production of .

ice.name: Ice
ice.description: Ice is a water source found in the Frozen Biome.

igneous_rock.name: Igneous Rock
igneous_rock.description: Igneous rock is a Mineral found in abundance in the Caustic and Oil Biomes and in smaller quantities in the Frozen and Temperate Biomes. It can be used as a general construction material.

insulite.name: Insulite
insulite.description: "Insulation" redirects here, for other uses, see , ,

iron.name: Iron
iron.description: Iron is a Refined Metal produced by processing Iron Ore with a Rock Crusher, Metal Refinery, or Smooth Hatches. It can be obtained by making a trip to a Metallic Asteroid with a Cargo Bay. Iron is also produced in its Liquid phase by Iron Volcanoes. Iron has a overheat modifier.

iron_ore.name: Iron Ore
iron_ore.description: Iron Ore is a Metal Ore found in abundance in the Caustic Biome and Oil Biome. It is used as a construction material and can be refined into pure Iron.

isosap.name: Isosap
isosap.description: Isosap is a rare resource that can be acquired from Space Missions to destinations containing it with a Cargo Bay equipped. In Spaced Out it can be acquired by heating the Sap produced by Experiment 52B.

lead.name: Lead
lead.description: Lead is a Refined Metal naturally obtainable in the Oil Biome. Lead has a overheat modifier.

lime.name: Lime
lime.description: Lime is a Consumable Ore that is used in the production of , and must be processed from Egg Shells, Pokeshell Molts, or in a Rock Crusher.

mafic_rock.name: Mafic Rock
mafic_rock.description: Mafic Rock is a construction material that exists in the Space Biome and the Rust Biome. When Mafic Rock is heated to (melting point + 2 °C), it will turn into .

mud.name: Mud
mud.description: Mud is a resource found in Swampy Biome on the starting asteroid. Similar to Sand, it is affected by Gravity and will fall down if the tile beneath it is mined.

neutronium.name: Neutronium
neutronium.description: Neutronium is a special type of resource, that can be found at the outer edges (between 150~200 blocks around the Printing Pod) and in a row of 4 tiles under each Geyser.

nickel.name: Nickel
nickel.description: Nickel is a Refined Metal produced by processing with a Rock Crusher, Metal Refinery, or Smooth Hatches.

nickel_ore.name: Nickel Ore
nickel_ore.description: Nickel Ore is one of the Resources found in the Garden Biome.

niobium.name: Niobium
niobium.description: Niobium is a Rare Refined Metal that can be acquired via space missions.

obsidian.name: Obsidian
obsidian.description: Obsidian is a Mineral found in the Barren Biome and Volcanic Biome, and infrequently in the Frozen and Caustic biomes. Maps with any of the Boulders World Trait have Obsidian boulders scattered randomly outside the starting area. It is also found in small amounts blocking Geysers. A Duplicant must learn the Superduperhard Digging skill to dig Obsidian, making it a significant impediment in the early game.

oxylite.name: Oxylite
oxylite.description: Oxylite is a Consumable Ore resource. It is a fictitious compound that does not exist in the real world (The listed formula being that of Iridium (III) Oxide). It sublimates into if its surface is uncovered, losing mass until it disappears. Oxylite will stop releasing Oxygen if submerged in liquid or if the atmospheric pressure reaches 1,800 g in adjacent tiles (or in its tile, if mined) but will preserve its mass until the pressure is reduced, at which point it will continue emitting Oxygen in exchange for mass again.

packed_snow.name: Packed Snow
packed_snow.description: Packed Snow is a resource. It is what Snow Tiles are automatically made out of, as opposed to regular Snow since regular Snow will just fall. Its properties are the exact same as Snow, with the only difference being that it isn't unstable, unlike Snow.

peat.name: Peat
peat.description: Peat is a Consumable Ore found in the Garden Biome. It can be used to create power using a Peat Burner. Lumbs produce Peat after consuming enough resources.

phosphate_nodules.name: Phosphate Nodules
phosphate_nodules.description: Phosphate Nodules are an unused resource.

phosphorite.name: Phosphorite
phosphorite.description: Phosphorite is an Agriculture resource naturally found in Jungle Biomes and the Reef Biome.

plastic.name: Plastic
plastic.description: Plastic is an advanced building material. It is created either by using a Polymer Press to refine Plastic Monomers (Petroleum/Nectar/Resin), shearing Glossy Dreckos, or harvested from Tublia plants.

plastium.name: Plastium
plastium.description: Plastium is an end-game heat-resistant building material.

plywood.name: Plywood
plywood.description: Plywood is an alternative form of Wood that can be used as a substitute in recipes and the construction of buildings. It is exclusively obtained via the Plywood Press.

polluted_brine_ice.name: Polluted Brine Ice
polluted_brine_ice.description: is the Solid state of . It is frozen from Polluted Brine by cooling it down to (freezing point ).

polluted_ice.name: Polluted Ice
polluted_ice.description: Polluted Ice is naturally obtainable in the Tundra Biome. It is the solid state of Polluted Water.

polluted_mud.name: Polluted Mud
polluted_mud.description: Polluted Mud can be found in Swampy Biome on the starting asteroid in Spaced Out.

pyrite.name: Pyrite
pyrite.description: Pyrite is resource found on Gilded Asteroid space destination. It's equivalent in parameters to Copper Ore and can be smelted into Iron.

radium.name: Radium
radium.description: Radium is an unused element. It was likely meant to be used in the Spaced Out DLC, but it was replaced by Uranium. It still exists in the game and can be accessed with the Cell Painter in Sandbox or Debug mode.

refined_carbon.name: Refined Carbon
refined_carbon.description: Refined Carbon is a Consumable Ore which is obtained through Refinement, or by Rocketry. It can be created from , , , or using the Kiln. It is used for the production of Steel inside the Metal Refinery.

refined_phosphorus.name: Refined Phosphorus
refined_phosphorus.description: Refined Phosphorus is a Consumable Ore. It does not spawn as tiles in the world, but rather must be processed from Phosphorite.

regolith.name: Regolith
regolith.description: Regolith is a filtration medium that is primarily found in the Space Biome and the Regolith Biome on the Regolith Asteroid and in small amounts around Crashed Satellites and on the Moo Asteroid. It is also brought by Meteor Showers.

rubber.name: Rubber
rubber.description: is an insulator that is used to fabricate watertight equipment and advanced electrical cables.

rust.name: Rust
rust.description: Rust is a Consumable Ore, available in the Rust Biome.

salt.name: Salt
salt.description: Salt is Consumable Ore found in Ocean Biome, Rust Biome, and Beach Biome. When refined to Table Salt, it can be eaten with meals to increase Duplicant Morale by 1.

sand.name: Sand
sand.description: Sand is a filtration medium that exists predominantly in the Sandstone Biome and Ocean Biome.

sandstone.name: Sandstone
sandstone.description: Sandstone is one of the first materials someone will encounter. It is a Raw Mineral mostly found in the Sandstone Biome, the starting biome of Terra Asteroid or equivalent planetoid in Planetoid Clusters. Sandstone can be used in construction or as food for hatches.

sedimentary_rock.name: Sedimentary Rock
sedimentary_rock.description: Sedimentary Rock is a Mineral found in modest amounts in Swamp Biome and Ocean Biome. It can be used as a general construction material. Sedimentary Rock as food for Hatches increases the chance to produce a Stone Hatch Egg.

shale.name: Shale
shale.description: Shale is a Mineral found in the Garden Biome. It can be used as a general construction material.

siltstone.name: Siltstone
siltstone.description: is a Raw Mineral that can be found in the Beach Biome.

slime.name: Slime
slime.description: Slime is a resource found mostly in the Swamp Biome and in planetoids with the Slime Molds World Trait.

snow.name: Snow
snow.description: Snow is a water source found in the Frozen Biome. It is unstable and will fall down if not sitting on another tile or material.

solid_carbon_dioxide.name: Solid Carbon Dioxide
solid_carbon_dioxide.description: Solid Carbon Dioxide is the solid state of Carbon Dioxide. It is converted from Liquid Carbon Dioxide by cooling it down to (freezing point - 3 °C).

solid_chlorine.name: Solid Chlorine
solid_chlorine.description: Solid Chlorine is the Solid state of Chlorine element.

solid_crude_oil.name: Solid Crude Oil
solid_crude_oil.description: Solid Crude Oil is the Solid state of Crude Oil.

solid_ethanol.name: Solid Ethanol
solid_ethanol.description: Solid Ethanol is the Solid state of Ethanol.

solid_hydrogen.name: Solid Hydrogen
solid_hydrogen.description: Solid Hydrogen is the Solid state of Hydrogen.

solid_mercury.name: Solid Mercury
solid_mercury.description: Solid Mercury is a Solid Refined Metal fit for use in extremely cold environments.

solid_methane.name: Solid Methane
solid_methane.description: Solid Methane is the Solid state of Methane.

solid_naphtha.name: Solid Naphtha
solid_naphtha.description: Solid Naphtha is the Solid state of Naphtha.

solid_nuclear_waste.name: Solid Nuclear Waste
solid_nuclear_waste.description: Solid Nuclear Waste is a highly toxic solid full of radioactive contaminants. It melts into Nuclear Waste at .

solid_oxygen.name: Solid Oxygen
solid_oxygen.description: Solid Oxygen is the Solid state of Oxygen element.

solid_propane.name: Solid Propane
solid_propane.description: Solid Propane is an unused material and can only be obtained through the debug/sandbox mode.

solid_super_coolant.name: Solid Super Coolant
solid_super_coolant.description: Solid Super Coolant is the Solid state of Super Coolant.

solid_synthesis_gas.name: Solid Synthesis Gas
solid_synthesis_gas.description: Solid Synthesis Gas is an unused resource.

solid_visco_gel.name: Solid Visco-Gel
solid_visco_gel.description: Solid Visco-Gel is the Solid state of Visco-Gel, it can be used as a Plastics for buildings.

steel.name: Steel
steel.description: Steel is a mid game building material produced in Metal Refinery. It is mainly used in extreme environments such as in the Space Biome.

sulfur.name: Sulfur
sulfur.description: Sulfur is a byproduct of cooling down into . Sulfur can be found in warm variants of Rust Biome. In Spaced Out it is a key resource for the plants and critters in the Wasteland Biome.

tallow.name: Tallow
tallow.description: A chunk of raw grease that can be used in Food production or industrial processes.

thermium.name: Thermium
thermium.description: Thermium is a manufactured material with excellent thermal conductivity.

tungsten.name: Tungsten
tungsten.description: Tungsten is a Refined Metal obtained by melting or refining . It has the highest melting point of any Refined Metal and the third-highest of any buildable material (after Insulite and Diamond).

unreleased_content.name: Unreleased Content
unreleased_content.description: There is a large amount of unreleased content for Oxygen Not Included. Some of these can occasionally be reached in game (such as Refined Metals), but many of them are only hinted at in the files, art assets, or developer streams.

uranium_ore.name: Uranium Ore
uranium_ore.description: Uranium Ore is a Metal Ore found in the Radioactive Biome.

wolframite.name: Wolframite
wolframite.description: Wolframite is a Metal Ore that can be found in the Frozen Biome. It has the highest melting point of any metal ore, but provides no bonus to overheat temperature.

wood.name: Wood
wood.description: Wood can be harvested from Arbor Trees or Floxes, and by crushing the Molts of Oakshells, or by other natural sources.

zinc.name: Zinc
zinc.description: is a Refined Metal produced by processing with a Rock Crusher, Metal Refinery, or Smooth Hatches.

zinc_ore.name: Zinc Ore
zinc_ore.description: is a Metal Ore found in the Beach and Reef Biomes.

gas.name: Gas
gas.description: Gases are substances that expand to fill their container.

aluminum_gas.name: Aluminum Gas
aluminum_gas.description: Aluminum Gas is the Gas state of Aluminum. It has no use.

atmospheric_pressure.name: Atmospheric Pressure
atmospheric_pressure.description: Atmospheric Pressure is based on the amount, mass, and type of gas filling a space at a time.

breathable_gas.name: Breathable Gas
breathable_gas.description: These gases will allow Duplicants to breathe.

carbon_dioxide.name: Carbon Dioxide
carbon_dioxide.description: Carbon Dioxide is a common gas resource. It is exhaled by Duplicants and occurs naturally in almost all Biomes. It is heavier than most other gases and will sink to the lowest elevation if lighter gases are present.

carbon_gas.name: Carbon Gas
carbon_gas.description: Gas Carbon is the Gas state of carbon element.

chlorine_gas.name: Chlorine Gas
chlorine_gas.description: Chlorine is a gas found naturally occurring in the map. It is the second highest density gas after at room temperature. Chlorine is a great deterrent against germs, and the best possible heat insulator among gases.

cobalt_gas.name: Cobalt Gas
cobalt_gas.description: Gas Cobalt is the gaseous state of the Cobalt element.

copper_gas.name: Copper Gas
copper_gas.description: Gas Copper is the gas state of Copper element.

ethanol_gas.name: Ethanol Gas
ethanol_gas.description: Gas Ethanol is the gas state of Ethanol. It is heavier than most common gasses, including Carbon Dioxide.

gold_gas.name: Gold Gas
gold_gas.description: Gas Gold is the Gas state of Gold element.

helium.name: Helium
helium.description: Helium is an unused element, as can be seen in the gas.yaml file found in \StreamingAssets\elements which lists Helium as isDisabled: true.

hydrogen_gas.name: Hydrogen Gas
hydrogen_gas.description: Hydrogen Gas is one of the Resources in the game Oxygen Not Included. It is an unbreathable Gas that is extremely light and will rise above all other gases. This means that it will settle at the top of rooms and other open areas.

iridium_gas.name: Iridium Gas
iridium_gas.description: Iridium Gas is the Gas state of Iridium. It is produced by heating Molten Iridium up to (melting point + 3 °C).

iron_gas.name: Iron Gas
iron_gas.description: Gas Iron is the Gas state of Iron element.

lead_gas.name: Lead Gas
lead_gas.description: Gas Lead is the Gas state of Lead element.

mercury_gas.name: Mercury Gas
mercury_gas.description: Gas Mercury is the Gas state of Mercury element.

natural_gas.name: Natural Gas
natural_gas.description: Natural Gas is an unbreathable, relatively heavy gas, which sinks below but rises above and .

nickel_gas.name: Nickel Gas
nickel_gas.description: Nickel Gas is the Gas state of Nickel. It is produced by heating Molten Nickel up to (melting point + 3 °C).

niobium_gas.name: Niobium Gas
niobium_gas.description: Gas Niobium is the Gas state of Niobium element.

nuclear_fallout.name: Nuclear Fallout
nuclear_fallout.description: Nuclear Fallout is a highly toxic gas full of radioactive contaminants. It is formed in a reactor meltdown or as the exhaust of a rocket with a Radbolt Engine. It condenses into Nuclear Waste.

oxygen.name: Oxygen
oxygen.description: Oxygen, also known as O2, is one of the Resources in the game Oxygen Not Included. It is a Breathable Gas and required by Duplicants to survive. It can be produced by machines, such as the Oxygen Diffuser, Electrolyzer, Rust Deoxidizer, filtered from by Deodorizers or cooling to liquid form, or a small amount created by the Algae Terrarium.

phosphorus_gas.name: Phosphorus Gas
phosphorus_gas.description: Gas Phosphorus is the Gas state of Refined Phosphorus element.

polluted_oxygen.name: Polluted Oxygen
polluted_oxygen.description: Polluted Oxygen is a gas resource. Polluted Oxygen is breathable and works similarly to , allowing Duplicants to survive. However, it also acts as the primary vector of transmission for Slimelung germs and can just as easily spread Food Poisoning germs. Polluted Oxygen can be found in the world naturally in the Swamp Biome.

propane_gas.name: Propane Gas
propane_gas.description: Propane Gas is currently unused and can only be obtained using the debug/sandbox mode.

sour_gas.name: Sour Gas
sour_gas.description: Sour Gas is an intermediary oil product, that can occasionally be found in the Oil Biome when there is a heat leakage from Magma Biome.

steam.name: Steam
steam.description: Steam is the Gas state of Water, and can therefore be created by heating various types of Water above a critical temperature. Steam is denser than Oxygen or Natural Gas, but lighter than Sour Gas and Chlorine.

super_coolant_gas.name: Super Coolant Gas
super_coolant_gas.description: Gas Super Coolant is the Gas state of Super Coolant.

synthesis_gas.name: Synthesis Gas
synthesis_gas.description: Synthesis Gas is a Gas only available in debug mode.

tungsten_gas.name: Tungsten Gas
tungsten_gas.description: Gas Tungsten is the Gas state of Tungsten element.

zinc_gas.name: Zinc Gas
zinc_gas.description: is the Gas state of . It is vaporized from by heating it up to (vaporization point + 3 °C).

biodiesel.name: Biodiesel
biodiesel.description: Biodiesel is a Liquid composed of highly processed fatty acids from purified natural oils.

brackene.name: Brackene
brackene.description: Brackene is a late-game liquid Resource useful for Ranching purposes and required to produce , an advanced intermediate product.

brine.name: Brine
brine.description: Brine is a source of and . It is naturally obtainable in low temperature areas of the Ocean Biome.

crude_oil.name: Crude Oil
crude_oil.description: Crude Oil is one of the Resources in Oxygen Not Included. It is heavier than , , and and will sink if in a pool with these Liquids.

ethanol.name: Ethanol
ethanol.description: Ethanol is a liquid fuel refined from Wood. It also appears naturally in Rust Biome and Cool Pool Biome. It can be used as a Power source.

gunk.name: Gunk
gunk.description: Gunk is a liquid produced by Bionic Duplicants.

latex.name: Latex
latex.description: is an liquid intermediary product used in the production of .

liquid_carbon.name: Liquid Carbon
liquid_carbon.description: Liquid Carbon is the Liquid state of carbon element.

liquid_carbon_dioxide.name: Liquid Carbon Dioxide
liquid_carbon_dioxide.description: Liquid Carbon Dioxide is the liquid state of Carbon Dioxide. It is converted from Carbon Dioxide by cooling it down to (condensation point - 3 °C).

liquid_chlorine.name: Liquid Chlorine
liquid_chlorine.description: Liquid Chlorine is the Liquid state of Chlorine element. It is converted from Chlorine by cooling it down to (condensation point - 3 °C).

liquid_helium.name: Liquid Helium
liquid_helium.description: Liquid Helium is currently unused and can only be obtained through debug mode.

liquid_hydrogen.name: Liquid Hydrogen
liquid_hydrogen.description: Liquid Hydrogen is the Liquid state of Hydrogen. It is obtained by cooling Hydrogen down to (condensation point - 3 °C).

liquid_methane.name: Liquid Methane
liquid_methane.description: Methane is liquid made from condensing Natural Gas.

liquid_naphtha.name: Liquid Naphtha
liquid_naphtha.description: Naphtha is a waste product resulting from melting Plastic at (melting point ), Isosap at (melting point +3°C. in ) or Visco-Gel at (melting point +3°C). It has a 1:1 conversion-ratio.

liquid_nuclear_waste.name: Liquid Nuclear Waste
liquid_nuclear_waste.description: Liquid Nuclear Waste is a highly toxic liquid full of radioactive contaminant. It emits radiation proportional to the mass of the waste. It vaporizes into at and solidifies into . Unless pressurized up to above before freezing, it will freeze as debris rather than form a solid tile.

liquid_phosphorus.name: Liquid Phosphorus
liquid_phosphorus.description: Liquid Phosphorus is the liquid state of Refined Phosphorus element and the melting form of Phosphorite.

liquid_propane.name: Liquid Propane
liquid_propane.description: Liquid Propane is an unused material and can only be obtained through the debug/sandbox mode.

liquid_sucrose.name: Liquid Sucrose
liquid_sucrose.description: Liquid sucrose is the result of melting Sucrose

liquid_sulfur.name: Liquid Sulfur
liquid_sulfur.description: Liquid Sulfur is the Liquid state of Sulfur element.

liquid_uranium.name: Liquid Uranium
liquid_uranium.description: Liquid Uranium is the Liquid state of Uranium element. It is melted from Depleted Uranium or Uranium Ore when heated to or from Enriched Uranium heated to .

magma.name: Magma
magma.description: Magma is found in the Magma Biome, most likely at the bottom end of the map, and produced by Volcanoes and Minor Volcanoes. Its high temperature can cause problems but also can provide processing opportunities. Handle with care.

mercury.name: Mercury
mercury.description: Mercury is a metallic Liquid. It is particularly useful as a thermal conductor.

molten_aluminum.name: Molten Aluminum
molten_aluminum.description: Molten Aluminum is the Liquid state of Aluminum element.

molten_cobalt.name: Molten Cobalt
molten_cobalt.description: Liquid Cobalt is the Liquid state of Cobalt element. It is melted from Cobalt by heating it up to (melting point + 2 °C).

molten_copper.name: Molten Copper
molten_copper.description: Molten Copper is the liquid state of Copper element. It is melted from Copper by heating it up to (melting point + 3 °C).

molten_glass.name: Molten Glass
molten_glass.description: Molten Glass is the Liquid state of Glass. It is produced by the Glass Forge at .

molten_gold.name: Molten Gold
molten_gold.description: Liquid Gold is the Liquid state of Gold element. It is melted from Gold or Gold Amalgam when heating them up to (melting point + 3 °C).

molten_iridium.name: Molten Iridium
molten_iridium.description: Molten Iridium is the Liquid state of Iridium. It is produced by heating Iridium up to (melting point + 3 °C).

molten_iron.name: Molten Iron
molten_iron.description: Liquid Iron is the Liquid state of Iron element. It is melted from Iron by heating it up to (melting point + 3 °C).

molten_lead.name: Molten Lead
molten_lead.description: Molten Lead is the Liquid state of Lead element.

molten_nickel.name: Molten Nickel
molten_nickel.description: Molten Nickel is the Liquid state of Nickel. It is produced by heating Nickel up to (melting point + 3 °C).

molten_niobium.name: Molten Niobium
molten_niobium.description: Liquid Niobium is the liquid form of Niobium. If it is heated any more it may become Gas Niobium.

molten_steel.name: Molten Steel
molten_steel.description: Liquid Steel is the Liquid state of Steel. It has the highest thermal conductivity and largest thermal range of any liquid, making it ideal for complex high-temperature processing.

molten_synthesis_gas.name: Molten Synthesis Gas
molten_synthesis_gas.description: Molten Synthesis Gas is an unused resource.

molten_tungsten.name: Molten Tungsten
molten_tungsten.description: Liquid Tungsten is the Liquid state of Tungsten. It has the highest boiling point of all Liquids.

molten_zinc.name: Molten Zinc
molten_zinc.description: is the Liquid state of . It is melted from Zinc by heating it up to (melting point + 3 °C).

mucin.name: Mucin
mucin.description: is a viscous gel produced by Slogos that can be used as a substitute.

nectar.name: Nectar
nectar.description: Nectar is an organic liquid only produced by Bonbon Trees. It can be used in the production of Plastic, Ethanol and Sucrose.

ovolene.name: Ovolene
ovolene.description: is a liquid intermediary product made by Seaquines.

petroleum.name: Petroleum
petroleum.description: Petroleum is a late game, powerful fuel for Power generation and Rocket engines. It stacks up to 740 kg/tile when not pressurized.

phyto_oil.name: Phyto Oil
phyto_oil.description: Phyto Oil is a Liquid produced at a Plant Pulverizer used as lubricant and creating Biodiesel. It turns to Algae and Carbon Dioxide when heated.

polluted_brine.name: Polluted Brine
polluted_brine.description: is a source of and . It is naturally found in abundance in the Abyss Biome.

polluted_water.name: Polluted Water
polluted_water.description: Polluted Water is the most common naturally occurring liquid on most asteroids, especially in the Swamp Biome. It also fills caves with Polluted Oxygen. Polluted Ice in the Frozen Biomes will also start melting into cold puddles of Polluted Water once they are breached.

resin.name: Resin
resin.description: Resin is an organic liquid that can be transformed into Plastic.

salt_water.name: Salt Water
salt_water.description: Salt Water is a source of Water and Salt. It is naturally obtainable in Ocean Biome.

super_coolant.name: Super Coolant
super_coolant.description: Super Coolant is a special liquid with the lowest freezing point (), a high boiling point, the highest Specific Heat Capacity (8.440 (DTU/g)/°C) and a very high Thermal Conductivity.

visco_gel_fluid.name: Visco-Gel Fluid
visco_gel_fluid.description: is a special liquid which does not flow horizontally like normal liquids when stacked on top of another tile with .

water.name: Water
water.description: Water, also known as H20, is one of the most important Resources in the game. Water is necessary for making food and supplying but does not need to be directly consumed by Duplicants for survival, contrary to what its description suggests.
